items.name_en: Model 30012
items.name_cn:
Model 30012
The new favorite LOEWE Puzzle features a gradient color scheme that looks like sunset hues woven into the bag body
The woven handle is exquisite and unique, giving a relaxed vibe when carried casually
The 3D geometric shape is super spacious, perfect for daily outings or short trips 🎒
Just stuff everything in and go
Wear it on the street and turn heads instantly
Finally understand why fashionistas love LOEWE
Practical and stylish, whoever wears it becomes a walking fashion recommendation 🌿
- 24cm
ootd|LOEWE Puzzle Gradient Bag

items.name_en: Biker Puzzle⸂⸂⸜👊⸝⸃⸃In Stock!!️
items.name_cn:
Biker Puzzle⸂⸂⸜👊⸝⸃⸃In Stock!!️
Size: 24-16-10
🌟Biker Puzzle, the ultimate battle bag for cool girls, 2025 is bound to be hot!
Top-tier soft nappa leather vs. cold hard metal chains
This ultimate collision is the DNA of the Biker series!
🌟Soft to the touch, fierce to the look
Wear it and become the cool girl who masters both elegance and rebellion!
🌟Shoulder, crossbody, or handbag, one bag three ways, easily switch between high-street, retro, and techwear styles!

items.name_en: LOEWE🌟New Arrival Medium Nappa Leather Featherlight Puzzle Handbag. A rectangular silhouette defined by distinctive geometric lines. Soft, lightweight Nappa leather lends a casual, relaxed vibe. This version features a shoulder strap, injecting new vitality into the design.
items.name_cn:
LOEWE🌟New Arrival Medium Nappa Leather Featherlight Puzzle Handbag. A rectangular silhouette defined by distinctive geometric lines. Soft, lightweight Nappa leather lends a casual, relaxed vibe. This version features a shoulder strap, injecting new vitality into the design.
*Removable and adjustable shoulder strap with rotating buckle
*Zipper closure, articulated zipper pull
*One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket
*Removable LOEWE hot-stamped or silver-plated label, featuring a hidden pocket and a balloon die
*Rectangular metal studs
*Nappa leather lining
*Anagram embossing, LOEWE engraved on the interior plaque
Model: 062608
Size: 29*12*19.5cm

items.name_en: 🌟New Arrival 🆕 Large Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag. The Puzzle bag features a distinctive rectangular silhouette defined by geometric lines. This large version is crafted from glossy calfskin, detailed with denim-style details. Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand*Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap*Zipper closure, leather zipper pull*One external zip pocket, one internal slip pocket*Herringbone cotton canvas lining*Anagram embossing
items.name_cn:
🌟New Arrival 🆕 Large Glossy Calfskin Panta Puzzle Handbag. The Puzzle bag features a distinctive rectangular silhouette defined by geometric lines. Can be worn over the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand*Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap*Zipper closure, leather zipper pull*One external zip pocket, one internal slip pocket*Herringbone cotton canvas lining*Anagram embossing
size: 33×14.7×21.5cm
Model:052500

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟Mini Soft Suede Amazona 180 Handbag. Reinterpreting the House's iconic bag with a casual silhouette and a single top handle. The bag features an open design with a hidden snap closure for the main compartment. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap for a practical look. This mini version is made of suede and calfskin.*Two carrying modes*Short top handle, detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap*Zipper with two leather pulls*Two compartments, main compartment with magnetic snap closure*Left D-ring is customizable*Suede lining with LOE*WE hot-stamped or silver-hot-stamped, Double L embossed logo🌟
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟Mini Soft Suede Amazona 180 Handbag. Reinterpreting the House's iconic bag with a casual silhouette and a single top handle. The bag features an open design with a hidden snap closure for the main compartment. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap for a practical look. This mini version is made of suede and calfskin.*Two carrying modes*Short top handle, detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap*Zipper with two leather pulls*Two compartments, main compartment with magnetic snap closure*Left D-ring is customizable*Suede lining with LOE*WE hot-stamped or silver-hot-stamped, Double L embossed logo🌟
size:20*7*11.5CM
Model:062603

items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟 Small Soft Calfskin Amazona 180 Handbag. A reinterpretation of the iconic L bag, featuring a casual silhouette with a single top handle. The bag features an open design with a hidden clasp securing the main compartment. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap for a practical look. This small size is crafted from soft calfskin.
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟 Small Soft Calfskin Amazona 180 Handbag. A reinterpretation of the iconic L bag, featuring a casual silhouette with a single top handle. The bag features an open design with a hidden clasp securing the main compartment. Equipped with a detachable shoulder strap and crossbody strap for a practical look. This small size is crafted from soft calfskin.
*Three carrying ways* Short handle, detachable shoulder, and crossbody strap
*Zipper with two leather pulls*
*Two compartments, main compartment with magnetic closure*
*Flat pocket inside*
*D-ring on the left for customization*
*Suede lining with LOE*WE hot stamping or silver stamping, Double L embossed brand logo🌟
size:24.5*10*18.5CM
Model:262552

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
Featuring a contrast of patent calfskin + suede lining, it feels soft and smooth, maximizing the premium feel!
Classic bag shape, iconic Anagram embossing, and a vintage yet stylish vibe!
Double zipper closure. Although mini and exquisite, it has enough capacity for powder, phone, tissues, etc.!
The mini size looks relaxed whether carried by hand or crossbody!
This Amazona is definitely a treasure this year💗
mini model number 89351 size 20*11.5*7 (box gift bag)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 finally arrives!
Featuring a contrast of fine soft matte calfskin + patent calfskin + suede Napa sheepskin lining, it feels soft and smooth, maximizing the premium feel!
Classic bag shape, iconic Anagram embossing + retro briefcase silhouette.
The large size looks cool and is photogenic when worn under the arm.
The interior has a magnetic closure and is quite spacious!
Three carrying ways: Hand, underarm, or crossbody.
The whole bag exudes a "natural and casual" French lazy vibe!
Large model number 89357-1
size:34.5*27*14 (gift bag only)

items.name_en: The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
items.name_cn:
The highly anticipated Amazona 180 is finally here!
Featuring a mix of patent calfskin and suede lining, it feels soft and luxurious!
Classic silhouette with the iconic Anagram embossing and retro briefcase shape.
The large size looks cool and is perfect for shoulder carry.
Magnetic closure inside with a large capacity!
Three carrying styles: Handbag, Shoulder, and Crossbody.
The whole bag exudes a natural, French "laid-back" vibe!
Large model number 89353
Dimensions 34.5*27*14 (gift bag included)
